message:
fix(vcr): distinguish absent vs explicitly-unset env var overrides in test helpers

The test env override helpers used Option<String> for the previous state,
conflating "never overridden" (absent from the map) with "explicitly unset"
(tombstone in the map). This meant restore_test_env_var could remove a
tombstone that was intentionally placed, causing env_var() to fall through
to the real environment instead of returning None.

Introduce TestEnvOverrideSnapshot enum with Absent, Unset, and Value
variants to track the three possible previous states correctly. Update
set_test_env_var and restore_test_env_var to use the new type.

Add test_env_override_helpers_restore_nested_tombstone_state test verifying
that restoring over a tombstone preserves the tombstone rather than
removing it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
